title: Persecutions Purify.
content:
God strikes His Church, but 'tis to this intent,
    To make, not mar her, by this punishment;
    So where He gives the bitter pills, be sure
    'Tis not to poison, but to make thee pure.
meaning:
"Persecutions Purify." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
